plugin_desc: VeloCloud/VMware SD-WAN Edge router SNMP collection (enterprise 45346). Beyond standard IF-MIB interface metrics, it collects VeloCloud private health OIDs for CPU utilisation (5-minute average, reported directly as a percentage) and memory usage (reported directly as a percentage). Temperature/fan/power are not collected here, so they are N/A. Supported brands/models - VeloCloud/VMware SD-WAN Edge routers.
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: Five-minute average CPU utilisation of the VeloCloud Edge router, reported directly as a percentage.

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Used memory percentage of the VeloCloud Edge router, reported directly as a percentage.
